_scenario: Baby 6 months — All domains on-track, enrichment plan
_mode_note: LEARN: routine monitoring, all Z-scores above 65. LLM generates enrichment activities spread evenly across all 3 domains.

day1_activities.title: Supported Sitting Play
day1_activities.description: Prop baby in a supported sit and offer a range of textured toys to explore.

day1_activities.title: Mirror Time
day1_activities.description: Hold baby in front of a mirror and name body parts they touch.

day1_activities.title: Singing Routine
day1_activities.description: Sing the same 2 songs during bath and meal time to build anticipation.
